title: swiftDialog Inspect Mode Configuration
description: Configuration schema for swiftDialog's Inspect mode presets (preset1-preset6). Used with: /usr/local/bin/dialog --inspect-mode --inspect-config <path> or ignitecli ipc inspect <path>

x-ipc-protocol.description: IPC command protocol for controlling Dialog at runtime via trigger file or DistributedNotifications

channels.com.swiftdialog.command: External -> Dialog: send commands (ignitecli ipc send)
channels.com.swiftdialog.event: Dialog -> External: lifecycle events (ready, exit, step_changed, button_click, selection)
channels.com.swiftdialog.ack: Dialog -> External: command acknowledgments with stepId and status
channels.com.ignitecli.command: Also observed by Dialog for ignitecli interop

navigation.reset: Reset all progress and return to first step

completion.success:<stepId>:<message>: Mark step as successful with optional message
completion.failure:<stepId>:<reason>: Mark step as failed with optional reason
completion.complete:<stepId>: Mark step as complete (no result state)

content_updates.update_guidance:<stepId>:<blockIndex>:<p: Update a guidance block property (state, actual, label, content, visible, progress, etc.)
content_updates.update_guidance:<stepId>:<blockId>:<prop: Same but resolve block by ID instead of index

badges.badge:<blockId>:<state>: Shorthand: update a status-badge state by block ID (resolves across all steps)

selections.select:<key>:<value1,value2>: Set selection values for a dropdown/radio/grid by key

validation.recheck:<itemId>: Re-evaluate monitors for a specific item

shorthand_notifications.description: When sending via DistributedNotification (ignitecli ipc send), commands are auto-expanded to JSON shorthand. Example: 'success:edge:Installed' becomes {"success": "edge:Installed"}

lifecycle_events.ready: Posted when Dialog is initialized and ready for commands. Readiness file written to readinessFile path with JSON: {pid, triggerFile, timestamp, ackChannel, preset, itemCount, items}
lifecycle_events.exit: Posted when Dialog closes. Includes exitCode, completedCount, failedCount, totalSteps, resultFile
lifecycle_events.defer: Posted when user selects a deferral option. Exit code 10, result file contains deferDuration and deferSeconds
lifecycle_events.step_changed: Posted when user navigates to a different step. Includes stepId
lifecycle_events.button_click: Posted when user clicks a button. Includes stepId, label, action
lifecycle_events.selection: Posted when user makes a selection. Includes key, values

ignitecli_commands.ignitecli ipc wait-ready [--timeout N]: Wait for Dialog ready event (notification-first, file fallback)
ignitecli_commands.ignitecli ipc wait-step <stepId> [--time: Wait for user to navigate to a step

status_badge_pattern.description: status-badge displays label (top, bold) + actual or state (bottom, colored). Use state for semantic coloring and actual for the display value.
status_badge_pattern.example_dynamic_update: ignitecli ipc batch --step hw --json '{"0": {"state": "success", "actual": "Apple M4 Max"}}'

critical_pattern.description: Pre-load data BEFORE navigating. Dialog's dynamicState buffers writes for any step. Data sent after navigation arrives mid-animation and renders late.
critical_pattern.correct: ignitecli ipc batch --step step3 --json '{...}' && ignitecli ipc send next
critical_pattern.wrong: ignitecli ipc send next && ignitecli ipc batch --step step3 --json '{...}'

preset4_toast_installer.description: Compact toast showing app installation progress
preset4_toast_installer.script: ignitecli ipc inspect config.json && ignitecli ipc wait-ready && ignitecli ipc send 'success:slack:Done' && ignitecli ipc send 'success:zoom:Done'

preset6_sysinfo_dashboard.description: Sidebar dashboard with live system info via status-badge actual values
preset6_sysinfo_dashboard.script: ignitecli sysinfo all > /tmp/info.json && ignitecli ipc inspect config.json

deferral_flow.description: Update prompt with 'Not Now' deferral menu (exit code 10)

dynamic_batch_update.description: Update multiple status badges atomically after running checks
dynamic_batch_update.script: ignitecli ipc batch --step checks --json '{"0": {"state": "success", "actual": "192.168.1.123"}, "1": {"state": "fail", "actual": "8 GB free (need 20)"}, "2": {"progress": "0.66", "label": "Checking..."}}'

ignitecli_tools.description: ignitecli system tools that produce data for Dialog badges

tools.ignitecli sysinfo all: JSON with hardware, disk, network, os, user info
tools.ignitecli check all --step <id>: Run network/storage/OS checks with auto badge updates

accentBorderColor.description: Top accent border color for branded presets (hex format, e.g., '#DC0A15')

actionPipe.description: Optional FIFO path for instant script request delivery

autoAdvanceDelay.description: Seconds to wait before auto-advancing to next step (default: 0.5). Set higher (e.g., 2.0) to let users see check results.

autoAdvanceOnComplete.description: Preset6: Auto-navigate to next step after marking complete

backButtonStyle.description: Back button placement: 'inline' (inside scroll content) | 'footer' (in footer bar)

banner.description: Banner image path (overrides icon in some presets)

brands.description: Available brand options for brand picker step (multi-brand onboarding)

debugMode.description: Debug/testing mode - ignore completion flags, always start from step 1 (preserves form values)

eventFile.description: Path to write JSONL step events (step_started, step_completed, etc.)

finalButtonText.description: Button text when all items complete

footerTextColor.description: Footer text color (hex format, for dark backgrounds)

iconBasePath.description: Base path for relative icon paths

introSteps.description: Array of intro steps for Preset5 intro wizard flow

items.description: Array of item configurations (used by preset1-6)

labels.description: Unified labels: single flat key-value for all Dialog UI text. Merges uiLabels + complianceLabels + pickerLabels. Takes precedence over legacy structs. Supports inline translations.

translations.description: Inline translations keyed by language code (e.g., 'de', 'fr'). Each value is a flat key-value map of label overrides.

observeOnly.description: Global observe-only mode - disables all user interactions

overlayicon.description: Overlay icon for brand identity badges

preset.description: The preset layout to use. Aliases: preset1/1/deployment (sidebar + item list), preset2/2/cards (card carousel), preset3/3/compact (compact list), preset4/4/toast/compact-installer (toast installer), preset5/5/portal/self-service/webview-portal (unified preset), preset6/6/guidance/modern-sidebar (modern sidebar)

progressMode.description: Preset4: 'shared' (single bar, X of Y) | 'perItem' (indeterminate per item)

readinessFile.description: Path to write readiness signal JSON (default: '{triggerFile}.ready'). Written when preset is ready for commands.

resultFile.description: Path to write JSON result on exit (selections, form values, step statuses)

resumable.description: Opt-in state persistence: when true, saves progress and resumes on relaunch

rotatingImages.description: Array of image paths for rotation

showAccentBorder.description: Show top accent border ribbon (default: true)

sideInterval.description: Side message rotation interval in seconds

skipPortal.description: Skip portal phase entirely (Preset5) - go directly from intro to outro

supportText.description: Optional support contact text in footer

triggerFile.description: Custom trigger file path (overrides dev/prod defaults)

AppConfigSource.description: MDM AppConfig source for dynamic branding overrides. Maps MDM managed preference keys to existing InspectConfig branding fields.

allowedBrandsKey.description: MDM key for array of allowed brand IDs (brand picker filtering)

button1TextKey.description: MDM key for primary button text

button2TextKey.description: MDM key for secondary button text

domain.description: Preference domain (e.g., 'com.company.branding'). Defaults to app bundle identifier.

introButtonTextKey.description: MDM key for intro continue button text

introTitleKey.description: MDM key for intro screen title

outroButtonTextKey.description: MDM key for outro close button text

outroTitleKey.description: MDM key for outro screen title

supportURLKey.description: MDM key for support URL override

clientCertIdentity.description: Common name of client certificate in keychain (for mTLS)

staticToken.description: Direct bearer token value (e.g., for Cloudflare)

BentoCellConfig.description: Configuration for a bento grid cell

detailOverlay.description: Optional detail overlay shown when cell is clicked

gradientPalette.description: Array of hex colors for gradient palette

iconColor.description: Hex color for SF Symbol (overrides accentColor)

sfSymbol.description: SF Symbol name for icon content type

BrandConfig.description: Brand option for multi-brand onboarding picker

logoConfigPath.description: Active logo path for footer/sidebar (overrides logoConfig.imagePath)

BrandPalette.description: Brand color palette with semantic color tokens and logo presets. Use $tokenName syntax to reference tokens (e.g., '$primary').

logos.description: Logo presets (name -> path or SF Symbol string)

checksPassed.description: Format for 'X of Y checks passed' (use {passed}, {total})

label.description: Human-readable label override; auto-generated from duration if nil

DeferralConfig.description: User-initiated deferral menu configuration. Integrates with ignitecli's deferral system (env vars, exit code 10, result file). Shared across presets.

enabled.description: Show defer menu (also enabled if IGNITECLI_DEFER_ENABLED=true env var is set)

options.description: Deferral duration options. Falls back to IGNITECLI_DEFER_OPTIONS env var if not set.

detailMedia.description: Image/GIF/video path for right-side media panel in inline detail view

icon.description: SF Symbol or image path for header

wide.description: Use wider overlay dimensions (900-1100 instead of default 720-880)

FeatureItem.description: A feature row in feature-table (legacy format)

icon.description: Optional SF Symbol icon for column header

values.description: Boolean values for each column (true = checkmark, false = X)

GridItemConfig.description: Grid item for picker screens (wallpaper, theme selection, etc.)

value.description: Value to store when selected (defaults to id)

actual.description: Display value for status-badge (shown instead of state text while state controls icon/color) or actual value for comparison-table

bentoColumns.description: Number of columns in bento grid

bentoGap.description: Gap between cells in points for bento grid

bentoRowHeight.description: Base row height in points for bento grid

bentoTintColor.description: Base hex color for auto-tinting bento cells

cardIcon.description: SF Symbol icon for card header

discreteSteps.description: Array of discrete step values with labels for slider. When defined, slider snaps to these values instead of continuous range.

helpText.description: Help text displayed in info popover

id.description: Unique identifier for storing user input

numbered.description: For bullets: use numbered circle icons (1.circle.fill, etc.) instead of a single icon

portalBrandingHeader.description: Header name for branding key (default: X-Brand-ID)

portalBrandingKey.description: Branding key to send as header (uses global portalConfig if nil)

portalCustomHeaders.description: Additional custom headers to send with portal requests

portalHeight.description: Height of embedded portal view in points

portalOfflineMessage.description: Custom message when portal is offline

portalShowHeader.description: Show portal header bar with refetch button

portalURL.description: Override portal URL for this block (uses global portalConfig if nil)

portalUserAgent.description: Custom user agent for portal requests

regexError.description: Error message when regex validation fails

requestId.description: Abstract identifier for script callback (for action: request)

required.description: Whether this input is required for step completion

shell.description: Shell command to execute (for action: shell)

shellTimeout.description: Timeout in seconds for shell command

style.description: Display style for phase-tracker or progress-bar

wallpaperCategories.description: Categories of wallpapers to choose from

wallpaperColumns.description: Number of columns per row for wallpaper picker

wallpaperImageFit.description: Image scaling mode for wallpaper picker

wallpaperMultiSelect.description: Number of monitors for multi-select (nil/0 = single select)

wallpaperShowPath.description: Show file path below wallpaper selection

itemId.description: Links to items[] entry for dynamic status updates

heroImagePadding.description: Inset padding in points (nil = auto ~4%, 0 = none)

IntroStep.description: A step in the multi-step wizard. Properties vary by stepType.

actionButtonText.description: Custom button text for this step's action

banner.description: Banner image path for card-style presets

blocking.description: Mark item as blocking further progress

continueButtonText.description: Custom button text after step completes

finalButtonText.description: Custom button text when step is complete

gradientColors.description: Custom gradient colors for this card

guidanceContent.description: Rich content blocks for the step

jsonMonitors.description: JSON monitors that auto-update guidance components

keyPointsText.description: Custom paragraph text for Key Points section

paths.description: File paths to monitor for validation

plistMonitors.description: Plist monitors that auto-update guidance components

plistRecheckInterval.description: Interval in seconds to recheck plist (0 = once)

processingDuration.description: Duration in seconds for processing steps

processingMode.description: Processing mode: simple auto-completes, progressive waits for triggers

required.description: Mark item as required for completion

showBundleInfo.description: Display bundle info when app is installed

status.description: Status icon for list items (supports dynamic updates)

successMessage.description: Message shown when step completes successfully

useUserDefaults.description: Use UserDefaults for instant notification-based monitoring

waitForExternalTrigger.description: Never auto-complete - always wait for success:/failure: command

waitLargeOverrideTime.description: Show large override button after X seconds

waitSmallOverrideTime.description: Show small override link after X seconds

waitWarningTime.description: Show warning after X seconds waiting

guidanceBlockIndex.description: Index of guidance component to update (0-based)

key.description: JSON key path to monitor (supports dot notation)

LocalizationConfig.description: Language sidecar files for translating intro step text. Files are flat JSON with keys like '{stepId}.title', '{stepId}.content.0.content'.

defaultLanguage.description: 'auto' = system locale, 'de' = hardcoded, null = no default

languagePicker.description: Show language selection page in legacy presets onboarding

languages.description: Language code -> relative file path map (e.g., { "de": "lang/de.json" })

LogMonitorConfig.description: Configuration for monitoring log files and extracting status text via regex patterns

autoMatch.description: Auto-match status to items by displayName

itemIds.description: Target item IDs for log monitor matches

predicate.description: Filter: only process lines containing this string

preset.description: Named preset with predefined regex pattern

startFromEnd.description: Start reading from end of file

imagePathDark.description: Dark mode variant (falls back to imagePath if nil)

introVerticalOffset.description: Vertical nudge for intro phase (falls back to verticalOffset)

opacity.description: Logo opacity (default: 0.6 for bottom, 1.0 for top)

outroVerticalOffset.description: Vertical nudge for outro/summary phase (falls back to verticalOffset)

verticalOffset.description: Vertical nudge in points: negative=up, positive=down

MediaItemConfig.description: Media item for carousel (images, GIFs, YouTube, Vimeo, etc.)

id.description: Unique identifier for the media item

guidanceBlockIndex.description: Index of guidance component to update (0-based)

key.description: Plist key to monitor (supports dot notation)

categoryIcons.description: Map category names to icon strings (e.g., 'OS Security': 'sf=shield.fill,colour1=#007AFF')

PortalConfig.description: Self-service portal configuration with optional authentication. URL can be provided via portalURL or portalURLFile.

button1Text.description: Portal-specific primary button text (overrides global button1text)

button2Text.description: Portal-specific secondary button text (overrides global button2text)

clientCertSubject.description: Client certificate subject for mTLS authentication. Selects certificate from keychain by matching subject name.

customHeaders.description: Additional custom HTTP headers to send with all requests

ephemeralSession.description: Use non-persistent data store. When true, cookies and session data are discarded on exit. Useful for shared devices or security-sensitive portals.

errorDetectionPhrases.description: DOM text phrases that indicate an error page (e.g., 'Something went wrong', 'Page not available'). Opt-in: leave empty to disable.

errorDetectionThreshold.description: Number of errorDetectionPhrases matches required to trigger error state

fallbackMessage.description: Message shown when portal is unavailable

openExternalLinksInBrowser.description: Open links to non-portal hosts in the default browser instead of loading inside the webview

portalURL.description: Base URL of the self-service portal (fallback if portalURLFile not found)

portalURLFile.description: Path to file containing portal URL. Read at launch, overrides portalURL. Useful for dynamic device-specific URLs set by external scripts.

retryDelay.description: Base delay between retries in seconds

selfServiceOnly.description: Skip outro screens, go directly to exit after portal

supportContact.description: Contact info shown when portal is offline (e.g., phone, email, Slack channel)

tokenRefreshInterval.description: Refresh token X seconds before expiry

userAgent.description: Custom User-Agent for web requests (e.g., 'swiftdialog.self-service/1.0'). Allows web services to detect and provide optimized views.

PreferencesOutputConfig.description: Configuration for user preference collection and plist output

staticValues.description: Static key-value pairs to always include

PresetIntroScreen.description: Lightweight intro screen shown before the items view in Preset1/2. Reuses GuidanceContentView for rich content rendering.

content.description: Rich content blocks (text, bullets, info, etc.)

showBackButton.description: Show back button (default: false — it's the first screen)

PresetSummaryScreen.description: Summary/bento screen shown after items complete in Preset1/2. Supports rich content and bento grid layouts.

StepBase.description: Common properties for all step types

condition.description: Script or expression to evaluate for conditional display

content.description: Rich content blocks for the step

continueAction.description: Action on continue: 'next', 'skip', 'portal', or custom script

evaluation.description: Evaluation type for plist condition checking

expectedValue.description: Expected plist value for condition checking

gridPreferenceKey.description: Key to write selection to preferences plist

gridSelectionKey.description: Key to store grid selection in userValues

heroImage.description: Path to image file, URL, or SF=symbolName for hero display

heroImagePadding.description: Inset padding in points (nil = auto ~4%%, 0 = none)

heroImageSFSymbolColor.description: Hex color for SF Symbol hero image (defaults to accentColor)

heroImageSFSymbolWeight.description: SF Symbol weight for hero image

monitorRefreshInterval.description: Global refresh interval in seconds for monitors

paths.description: Filesystem paths to check for existence

plistMonitors.description: Plist monitors for live content updates

requireManualConfirm.description: When true, success:/failure: IPC commands update state but don't auto-advance. User must click to proceed.

selectable.description: Whether this step participates in picker selection

stepType.description: Step type (default: 'intro'). 'portal' = embedded webview, 'assistant' = Apple Setup Assistant style, 'guide' = monitored step, 'deployment'/'carousel'/'showcase'/'bento'/'media' = specialized layouts

waitForExternalTrigger.description: Never auto-complete - wait for success:/failure: command

assistantImageHeight.description: Hero image area ratio 0.0-1.0 for assistant stepType

bentoGap.description: Gap between bento cells in points (default: 12)

bentoRowHeight.description: Base row height in points for bento grid (default: 140)

bentoSidebarRatio.description: Sidebar width ratio for split mode

bentoTintColor.description: Base hex color for auto-tinting bento cells without explicit backgroundColor

autoAdvanceOnComplete.description: Auto-navigate to next step when all items complete

bannerHeight.description: Banner image height when heroImage is a file/URL (default: 100)

items.description: Inline items for self-contained installation steps

autoAdvanceOnComplete.description: Auto-navigate to next step when all items complete

autoEnableButton.description: Disable Continue until all items complete (default: true)

autoEnableButtonText.description: Continue button text when all items complete (default: 'Done')

items.description: Inline items for self-contained installation steps

sideMessages.description: Rotating messages shown in content area (step-level)

heroBackgroundColor.description: Hex color for hero image background area (e.g., '#05164D')

installationMode.description: Transforms step into installation progress display

mediaFit.description: Media fill mode: 'fill' (crop) or 'fit' (show entire image)

mediaSide.description: Which side the media panel appears

showBackButton.description: Show back button (default: true except first step)

showcaseGradientColors.description: Hex colors for gradient background (fallback: highlightColor)

showcaseTextColor.description: Hex color for overlay text (fallback: white 90%)

skipButtonText.description: Secondary button label left of Continue (e.g., 'Set Up Later')

guideCategoryIcon.description: Category icon for sidebar header (SF symbol name)

guideGradientColors.description: Hex colors for left panel gradient (fallback: highlightColor)

guideKeyPoints.description: Key points text block for sidebar

mediaHeight.description: Height of media carousel in points

allowOverride.description: Enable override capability for stuck processing

processingDuration.description: Countdown duration in seconds for processing step

processingMode.description: Processing mode: 'simple' auto-advances, 'progressive' waits for trigger

waitLargeOverrideTime.description: Show large 'Override' button after X seconds

waitSmallOverrideTime.description: Show small 'Skip' link after X seconds

mediaHeight.description: Height of media carousel in points

blockIndex.description: Index in guidanceContent array to update

getStartedSubtitle.default: Follow the steps to complete setup

blockIndex.description: Index in guidanceContent array to update

thumbnail.description: Optional thumbnail path (uses path if nil)
